description: Style Note Get that chic look perfectly right with these jeggings from Kraus. Pair them with a long and flattering tunic and flat sandals for that pretty girl look that is simply irresistible. Product Details White jeggings, has a button and zipped closure, two insert pockets in front, two patch pockets at the back with branding on the right patch pocket and stretch Material and Care Blended Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Do not bleach Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
